summary: Frontend-only testing of dedicated FAQ page (/faq) and landing teaser. All critical flows verified: page load, hero copy + 69-answer badge, 8 sidebar sections with exact question counts (10/11/9/8/7/6/8/10), accordion expand/collapse via aria-expanded, live search filter + <mark> highlights for 'leverage', empty-state on no-match, search clear restores all 8 sections, sidebar anchor navigation (#faq-trading), Back button -> /, landing slim teaser rendering, 7 topic pills, 'See full FAQ' CTA navigation, nav-link-faq is a Router Link to /faq, mobile (390px) hides desktop sidebar and shows 8 horizontal pills. Regression confirmed: Affiliate is NOT in Products dropdown; Affiliate nav still links to /products/affiliate; FAQ link href='/faq'.

issues: Badge says 'FAQ · 65+ answers' but the dedicated /faq page now ships with 69 answers. Minor copy inconsistency — consider updating teaser badge to '69 answers' or keep '65+' as approximate. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Sync the landing teaser badge text ('65+ answers') with the real 69-question total on /faq for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: FaqPage.jsx is ~420 lines including a large inline SECTIONS data array. Acceptable, but if FAQ data grows further consider extracting SECTIONS into a separate /data/faq.js module for cleanliness.
Highlight component uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML-free approach (good). RegExp escape function present (good).
Sidebar uses native <a href='#...'> anchors — works fine for in-page scroll but on Router-based pages this triggers browser default behaviour; consider scrollIntoView for smoother UX (non-blocking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: FAQ page is fully functional. Desktop layout verified at 1920x1080, mobile at 390x844. All data-testids correctly wired. 69 Q&As across 8 sections. Search + accordion + navigation + back-to-landing all green. Only nit: landing teaser badge text says '65+' vs actual 69 — purely cosmetic.
